requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — IEC 62368-1 under UAE.S Standards, 230 V / 50 Hz / Type G Plug
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全 — UAE.S标准下的IEC 62368-1，230 V / 50 Hz / G型插头
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全 — UAE.S標準下的IEC 62368-1，230 V / 50 Hz / G型插頭

summary.en: UAE operates at 230 V AC / 50 Hz mains supply. The standard plug type is Type G (BS 1363, three-pin rectangular). Electrical safety compliance for information and communications technology equipment and audio/video equipment is required to IEC 62368-1 (or its predecessor IEC 60950-1 for products still in transitional scope) as adopted under UAE.S equivalent standards. ESMA oversees electrical safety standards under the UAE.S/UAE.SE series. Mains-powered wireless devices must demonstrate electrical safety conformance as part of the ESMA ECAS assessment process where the product is in scope. Products must be physically compatible with UAE mains supply (230 V / 50 Hz) and Type G outlet; Chinese Type I (two or three flat pins) or Type A plugs are not compatible without adaptation.
summary.zh: 阿联酋市电为230 V交流/50 Hz。标准插头类型为G型（BS 1363，三矩形扁销）。信息和通信技术设备及音视频设备的电气安全合规须依据IEC 62368-1（或对于仍在过渡范围内产品的前身IEC 60950-1），按UAE.S等效标准执行。ESMA依据UAE.S/UAE.SE系列标准负责电气安全标准的管理。市电供电的无线设备在产品属于ECAS范围时，须作为ESMA ECAS评估程序的一部分证明电气安全合规性。产品须与阿联酋市电供应（230 V / 50 Hz）及G型插座物理兼容；中国I型（两或三扁销）或A型插头在不经改造的情况下不兼容。
summary.zht: 阿聯酋市電為230 V交流/50 Hz。標準插頭類型為G型（BS 1363，三矩形扁插）。資訊和通訊技術設備及音視頻設備的電氣安全合規須依據IEC 62368-1（或對於仍在過渡範圍內產品的前身IEC 60950-1），按UAE.S等效標準執行。ESMA依據UAE.S/UAE.SE系列標準負責電氣安全標準的管理。市電供電的無線設備在產品屬於ECAS範圍時，須作為ESMA ECAS評估程序的一部分證明電氣安全合規性。產品須與阿聯酋市電供應（230 V / 50 Hz）及G型插座物理兼容；中國I型（兩或三扁插）或A型插頭在不經改造的情況下不相容。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62368-1:2018 (Audio/video, IT and communication technology equipment safety — 3rd edition)
Cabinet Decision No. 38 of 2016 on Product Safety (UAE)

summary.en: China uses 220 V AC / 50 Hz with Type I (two or three flat-pin) and Type A plug sockets. Electrical safety for IT and AV equipment is governed by GB 4943.1 (equivalent to IEC 60950-1) and progressively GB 4943.23 (equivalent to IEC 62368-1). CCC certification covers electrical safety for products listed in the CCC catalogue. Chinese products tested to GB 4943.1 hold CCC marks but are not rated for 230 V Type G plug configuration.
summary.zh: 中国使用220 V交流/50 Hz，I型（两或三扁销）及A型插座。IT及音视频设备的电气安全依据GB 4943.1（相当于IEC 60950-1）及逐步推进的GB 4943.23（相当于IEC 62368-1）执行。CCC认证涵盖CCC目录内产品的电气安全。依GB 4943.1测试并持有CCC标志的中国产品不适用于230 V G型插头配置。
summary.zht: 中國使用220 V交流/50 Hz，I型（兩或三扁插）及A型插座。IT及音視頻設備的電氣安全依據GB 4943.1（相當於IEC 60950-1）及逐步推進的GB 4943.23（相當於IEC 62368-1）執行。CCC認證涵蓋CCC目錄內產品的電氣安全。依GB 4943.1測試並持有CCC標誌的中國產品不適用於230 V G型插頭配置。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1-2011 (IT equipment safety — equivalent to IEC 60950-1)
GB 4943.23-2023 (audio/video/IT equipment safety — equivalent to IEC 62368-1)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — electrical safety scope
GB 1002 / GB 2099 (Chinese plug and socket standards)

gap.en: UAE uses 230 V / 50 Hz / Type G (BS 1363) plugs, while China uses 220 V / 50 Hz with Type I or A plugs. Wireless devices with mains power supplies must be rated for 230 V and fitted with or supplied with a Type G plug for UAE. CCC electrical safety certification to GB 4943.1 is not recognised in UAE; IEC 62368-1 test evidence under UAE.S standards and ESMA ECAS assessment is required where the product is in ESMA's regulated scope. Power supply unit redesign or dual-voltage specification may be needed.
gap.zh: 阿联酋使用230 V / 50 Hz / G型（BS 1363）插头，而中国使用220 V / 50 Hz的I型或A型插头。带市电电源的无线设备须额定230 V并为阿联酋配备或提供G型插头。GB 4943.1下的CCC电气安全认证不被阿联酋承认；若产品属于ESMA受监管范围，须提供UAE.S标准下的IEC 62368-1测试证据并进行ESMA ECAS评估。可能需要重新设计电源模块或采用双电压规格。
gap.zht: 阿聯酋使用230 V / 50 Hz / G型（BS 1363）插頭，而中國使用220 V / 50 Hz的I型或A型插頭。帶市電電源的無線設備須額定230 V並為阿聯酋配備或提供G型插頭。GB 4943.1下的CCC電氣安全認證不被阿聯酋承認；若產品屬於ESMA受監管範圍，須提供UAE.S標準下的IEC 62368-1測試證據並進行ESMA ECAS評估。可能需要重新設計電源模組或採用雙電壓規格。

source.publisher: ESMA — Emirates Authority for Standardization and Metrology (UAE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety compliance to IEC 62368-1 under UAE.S standards is required for mains-powered wireless devices sold in the UAE. UAE uses 230 V / 50 Hz / Type G (BS 1363) plugs; Chinese power accessories rated for 220 V with Type I or A plugs must be adapted. CCC certification to GB 4943.1 is not accepted as a substitute.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在阿联酋销售的市电供电无线设备须符合UAE.S标准下的IEC 62368-1电气安全要求。阿联酋使用230 V / 50 Hz / G型（BS 1363）插头；额定220 V的I型或A型中国电源配件须进行适配。GB 4943.1下的CCC认证不可作为替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在阿聯酋銷售的市電供電無線設備須符合UAE.S標準下的IEC 62368-1電氣安全要求。阿聯酋使用230 V / 50 Hz / G型（BS 1363）插頭；額定220 V的I型或A型中國電源配件須進行適配。GB 4943.1下的CCC認證不可作為替代。
